sourceNote: OHID Fingertips indicator 93283, Life expectancy at birth, MSOA, 2019-23; ONS 2021 LSOA-MSOA lookup; English Index of Multiple Deprivation 2025; DfT NaPTAN. Station values show the MSOA containing the station-local LSOA.
metric: Male life expectancy at birth for the MSOA containing each Metro station-local LSOA.
